typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varQTEArchiveDestFullPath as string (),
	varQTEArchiveFolder as string (),
	varQTEFileDateString as string (),
	varQTEFileName as string (),
	varQTEFilePrefix as string (),
	varQTEFullFileName as string (),
	varQTELatestSourceFileName as string (),
	varQTELatestSourceFullPath as string (),
	varQTELogFilePath as string (),
	varQTERecDate as timestamp (),
	varQTERenamedDestFullPath as string (),
	varQTEReportDate as string (),
	varQTESourceFolder as string ()
}

source(output(
		CIODirectSizing as string,
		TechStack as string,
		DISP_PLAN_Year as double,
		BAM_App_Name as string,
		L2 as string,
		L3 as string,
		L4 as string,
		L5 as string,
		BAM_APP_ID as string,
		BEAMS_BAM_Prev_TargetPlatform_Refined as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> xlCOOTechAppDisp
xlCOOTechAppDisp sink(input(
		App_Sizing as string,
		TechStack as string,
		PLAN__Year_ as double,
		BAM_App_Name as string,
		L2 as string,
		L3 as string,
		L4 as string,
		L5 as string,
		BAM_APP_ID as string,
		BEAMS_BAM_Final_DISP as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		App_Sizing = CIODirectSizing,
		TechStack,
		PLAN__Year_ = DISP_PLAN_Year,
		BAM_App_Name,
		L2,
		L3,
		L4,
		L5,
		BAM_APP_ID,
		BEAMS_BAM_Final_DISP = BEAMS_BAM_Prev_TargetPlatform_Refined)) ~> SQLqtecootechappdisp
